sarvanāmnā padārthamātraṃ vyapadiśyate / vastuyāthātmyavedibhir ity arthaḥ4 / apare tu māyāvādino 'nyathāvatārya varṇayanti5 / itaś
/ bhavitaiva / bhāviny api kāle sattāṃ na hāsyatīty arthaḥ / vāśabdād abhūtvā bhāvaḥ pratiṣiddhyate / nāyam
ity uktaṃ bhavatīti / tad idaṃ śradhāmātreṇa4 brahmopāsanam utprekṣitaṃ na śrutiliṅgaprakaraṇagamyam / prakaraṇaṃ hi yac coktam ucchoṣaṇam indriyāṇām iti paṭhanāt5
--- lābhālābhau (samau_kṛtvā) lābhe sukham alābhe duḥkham utpadyate / tayoḥ punaḥ ko hetur ity
śāstrasya śrutasya ca / tadā ca mohadurgaṃ vyatitīrya te buddhiḥ sthiram

āśramasamuccayo vā bhagavatā vivakṣitaḥ / (ātmanaḥ) sākṣātkāraṇāt4 prāgavasthāyāṃ karmaprādhānyam uttaratra jñānaprādhānyam ity upadeśāt / ataḥ sthiraṃ5 pratipuruṣam apavargādhikāre jñānakarmaṇī samuccīyeta ity etatparam idaṃ7 śāstram iti samyag darśitam / tadvākyāni ca tathaiva vyākhyātavyāni /
sāṅkhyadarśanam āśritya sarvadharmatyāgam ekavaiṇavino vadanti / te 'pi hy etenāpāstā veditavyāḥ4 nirākaraṇanyāyasyāviśeṣāt5 /
lokasaṅgrahaṇārthaṃ karmaṇaiva saṃsiddhim āsthitāḥ4 karmasannyāse prāpte 'py asannyasyaiva pravṛttakarmatvād iti / athāprāptajñānāḥ karmaṇā sattvaśuddhidvāreṇa5 jñānotpattim
/ māyāśabdaḥ prajñāvacanaḥ / svecchayety arthaḥ4 / nāhaṃ dharmaprayojyaḥ saṃsārī5 / vaśyaprakṛtitvād dehopādānāny
/ jñānasya tapaḥśaraṇānarthakyāt4 / jñānena5 pūtā iti siddhatvāt / na hi jñānena sadṛśam ---
buddhipūrvam antareṇa tatra pravṛtter eva kalpate / kṣutpipāsābhyāṃ pīḍyamānas
hi prakaraṇam ucyate / te cāneke yajñaviśeṣāḥ prativākyaṃ brahmaprāptyupāyā upadiśyante / jñānajñāpakatvān nānuvādaḥ / stutiś ca
devo bhūtvā devān apy eti --- iti / karmayoginaḥ paryupāsate / devādibhāve 'pi jñānotpattir iṣyate4 / tad yo yo devānāṃ
iti prathamāvibhakter nirdeśān nāsāv āptavyaḥ4 / tathā hi sannyāsam iti dvitīyā syāt /
vyākhyātā / yadi ca viduṣaḥ karmatyāgaḥ purastād uktaḥ4 syād arjunena pratipannaḥ syāt
kartṛtvādi svecchayā na sṛjati na ca karmaphalasaṃyogam āptakāmatvāt / sve mahimni hi paramātmā sthitaḥ4 / prāṇikarmaiva sṛṣṭau phalotpattau ca nimittam / īśvaras tu karmānuvidhāyī
jantavaḥ / tad āha --- svabhāvas tv ajñānenāvidyayā4 avidyā viparītajñānam / dehādiṣv ātmābhimāno brahmasvarūpāgrahaṇaṃ5 cāvidyocyate / tayāvṛtam ācchannaṃ jñānam / tena
prāpya cāpriyam / udvegaś cittavyathā / sthirā niścalā nirvicikitsā buddhir yasya sa sthirabuddhiḥ / asammūḍho viviktacittavṛttiḥ //
/ śāntarajasaṃ rajoviṣayeṣu pravṛttir brahmabhūtam --- bhū prāptāv ātmanepadīti smaraṇād bhūtaśabdaḥ prāptyarthaḥ / brahmaprāptam akalmaṣam4 //
/ cañcalaṃ hi manaḥ kṛṣṇa4 aticañcalam itas tato
/ ata eva tasya puṇyakṛl lokaprāptiḥ / na hi mām uddiśya kṛtam aphalāya bhavati / bhogāyāpavargāya vā tat sampadyate /
sarvalokavyavahāraḥ pravartate / puruṣasyedaṃ pauruṣaṃ puṃstvaṃ prajananakāraṇam //
matta eva iti tān viddhi / na tv ahaṃ teṣu / nāhaṃ janāśritaḥ / te tu punar mayi

ceto nāsty asāv ananyacetāḥ / satataṃ sarvadā nairantaryeṇa / nityaśa iti yāvajjīvam / tenaitad darśitaṃ vākyārthajñānamātreṇa kṛtārthatā / satatopāsanayā jñānaṃ paripakvaṃ muktikṣamaṃ sambhavatīti / tasyāhaṃ sulabhaḥ sukhena labhyo nityayuktasyeti nigamanam //

--- ityādhiśrutiprāmāṇyād viduṣaḥ prārabdhakarmakṣaye śarīrapātānantaraṃ mokṣāvadhāraṇāt kathaṃ brahmavidāṃ nivṛttakalmaṣāṇāṃ punar āvartanam / tathā yāvad adhikāram avasthitir adhikāriṇām4 --- iti śārīrakasūtrād adhikāre lokānugrahārthe vyāpāre ye 'vasthitās teṣāṃ prājāpatyādāv
/ tatprāptyupāyaś ca --- prayāṇakāle manasā --- ity ārabhyoktaḥ / (puruṣaṃ) prāptānāṃ cānāvṛttir uktā /
vapāhomaḥ kartavya iti / asya vidher avaśyānuṣṭhānāyārthavādavākyam --- prajāpatir vapām udakhidata
yā buddhir yaj jñānam17 bodhanaṃ buddhiḥ tām ahaṃ veda / niratiśayajñānayukto 'sāv iti jātis maratvāj
ca vyūḍhāṃ kṛtacaranāviśeṣāṃ (paśya) / yo hi bhavacchiṣyo buddhimāṃś ca so 'vaśyam17
pavitram idam uttamam iti kārṣṇavedam idaṃ puṇyam
prati kadācid asyāyuyutsā syāt tad enaṃ jñānopadeśena17 pravartayiṣyāmīti18 //
pātakaṃ yad vā mitrāṇi druhyatīti mitradhruk tasmin mitradruhi puruṣe yat pātakam
sarvādhipateḥ sambhāvyamānahitopadeśasahāyakasyāpi mumūrṣor glānisamutthaṃ18 śokaṃ sarvendriyāṇām indriyavṛttīnām ucchoṣaṇaṃ saṅkocakaram19 (apanudyāt) nirasyet tvāṃ vinety atas tvāṃ pṛcchāmīti20 //
/ tad etad ubhayaṃ tava (na) śobhate / yasmād gataprāṇānagataprāṇāmś
/ tasmāt saiva pāramārthiko / sarvo hi ghaṭādiḥ śarīrādiś ca prapañco māyāmātram asad iti manyante /

/ tadviṣayā buddhir uktety arthaḥ / yogaḥ karmānuṣṭhānopāyaḥ / phalasaṅkalparahitatvaṃ17 samatvam / kṛtasya kriyamāṇasya vā (karmaṇaḥ) īśvarārpaṇam iti / tvam imāṃ buddhiṃ18 śṛṇu / tāṃ viśinaṣṭi śrotuś
śaraṇam anviccha buddhim āśrayety arthaḥ17 / karmapravṛttikāle18 / (yataḥ kṛṣṇāḥ phala)hetavaḥ / kevalaṃ karmaṇaḥ phalaṃ pravṛttihetur yeṣāṃ19 te phalahetavaḥ20 //

hetur vidyate yadi vā vidvadbhis traivarṇikaiḥ17 karma tyajyeta svacchandatayā sarve karmiṇo brahmavidaḥ samudraṃ praviśeyuḥ18 / vividiṣāvatām api karmayogam eva darśayati --- tam etaṃ19 vedānuvacanena brāhmaṇā vividiṣanti yajñena dānena
/ tathāpy aviduṣaṃ sarvakarmatyāgopadeśo bhavato viruddhyeta / tathā coktam upadeśagranthe --- tvaṃpadārthavivekāya sannyāsaḥ sarvakarmaṇām17 --- iti /
/ katham / śarīrayātrā śarīrasthitir api na te prasiddhyed akarmaṇo nirvyāpārasya /

/ yathendhanasaṃyoge dhūmajanakatvam agnes tathā śarīrendriyasaṃyoge ātmanaḥ kartṛtvam / (tasya) kartṛtvaṃ svena niratiśayānandarūpeṇāvasthitasya17 nāstīti nirṇayaḥ / tatrāyam ajño 'haṅkāravimūḍhātmā svabhāvata
8. karmati ---va 9. tasya rūpaṃ ---va 10. vikkarma ---va 11. pāṣāṃḍibhirācāryamāṇaṃ ---va pāṣāṇḍibhirācarya 12. karmaṇoti ---vā 13. smārne
/ yathā pradīpenāndhakāranivṛttidvāreṇa17 ghaṭādir abhivyajyate / mokṣo hi nitya eva na ghaṭa iva kumbhakāreṇa kriyate / ato yuktaṃ karmaṇy akarma yaḥ paśyed iti /18 anye punar anyathā (vyā)cakṣate /
--- kriyā nāstīti na pratijñātuṃ17 śakyate / aṅguliś calati / devadatto gacchati / (brahmadattaḥ) pacati / parṇaṃ
/ vidhiśeṣatvena hi stutiḥ pravartate / yathā pūrṇāhutividheḥ stutyarthaḥ --- pūrṇāhutyā17
---la 7. yeṣā tu kṣātenaiti ādityavahadyathādityabhuvana ---va/la 8. brāhmeti kṣāvī ---va 9.

śāstraniṣiddhenānupanītena18 gṛhītaṃ (śāstrajñāna)m anarthotpādakam / yato nyāyasmṛtyācārāvirodhī yaḥ padārthaḥ19 sa śāstrārthaḥ / tatra nyāyaḥ yathotkṛṣṭanikṛṣṭavarṇayor na (karma) tulya(tā) tathā na sadṛśadharmatā yuktā / tad uktam
rūpeṇānyaparaṃ yadvākyaṃ18 śabdena cānyārthapratipādakaṃ talliṃ gam /
eva sarvaśarīrāvasthitaḥ sarvapadārthāvasthitaḥ satatā(sā)ditavimalabhāvaḥ sarvaśaktiḥ svaśaktivibhavajanitasakalādvaitasadrūpaḥ18 pra(tyakṣo) bhavati / sādhanavīryāt teṣām
athāto 'dhikāraḥ (iti) / athaśabda ānantaryārthaḥ / ataḥśabdo18 hetvarthaḥ / yato vedādhyayanaṃ pūrvavṛttam atas tadarthajñānāvasare prathamam adhikāro nirūpyate
/ sañjñānaṃ sañjñā / tuśabdaḥ18 pūrvebhyo viśeṣāvadyotanaḥ19 / yuyudhānādayo varākā yuṣmākaṃ purato 'kiñcitkarā20 ity arthaḥ //
--- pāpam eveti / etān hatvā pratyuta pāpam eva asmān āśrayet / yata ātatāyitve 'pi bhrātrādayaḥ sambhajanīyā vardhanīyā lāḍanoyā na tu

nānuśocanti paṇḍitāḥ / pariniṣṭhitatattvajñānāḥ18 paṇḍitāḥ / pariniṣṭhitatattvajñānāḥ18 paṇḍitā ucyante / atra punar ātmayāthātmyavādino 'bhipreyante19 / teṣāṃ tāvad ātmano 'vināśitvadarśanād aśokaḥ20 / tadvad avināsitvaṃ saṃpadya
vyapadeśaḥ (kvacid) bhedena ca bhaviṣyati / anādisiddhāś ca jīvāḥ sanātanā iti vacanān na teṣāṃ sargādāv utpādaḥ pralayo vānte / (ta)thā ca yājñavalkyaḥ18 ---

pramāṇakuśalāḥ pratyācakṣate18 / yat tāvad uktam --- pratyakṣādibhiḥ pramāṇair vikāro ghaṭādir nirūpyamāṇaḥ svarūpaṃ jahātīti tad asat / ālokendriyamanaḥsaṃskāre19 sati ghaṭo 'yaṃ paṭo 'yam iti pratyakṣā buddhir utpadyate / yayā buddhyā yo 'rtho pratīyate tayaiva tadabhāvaḥ
bhavatā karmaṇi ya(ti)tavyam / kutaḥ18 / śreṣṭhatvāt tad āha ---
kilbiṣaṃ pāpam / atha vā kilbiṣaṃ saṃsāraṃ18 pratipadyata iti yojanāntaram /
yasyāsau vimatsaro 'bhīṣṭavastusiddhāv asiddhau ca samaḥ / karma kṛtvāpi na nibadhyate / bandhahetūnāṃ18 cittadoṣāṇām
tattvadarśanam / tatra hi yuktam iti śabdaprayogāt pratīkopāsanam / ata eva sarvātmadarśitvāt --- brahmaiva tena gantavyam --- iti brahmaprāptivacanaṃ18 yuktam /
tatkārī ca bhavāṃs taddveṣī18 ca bhavān iti / kas tvadīyaṃ vacanaṃ19 pramāṇīkuryāt /
mūrkhatvāc ca / mūrkhatvaṃ ca tasyopanayanavedādhyayanatadarthādhigamapratiṣedhāt6 / tathā ca gautamaḥ

(vyavasthitān) vividhenākāreṇa6 yathāvibhavam avasthitān dṛṣṭvā śastrāṇāṃ sampāte pravṛtte dhanur utkṣipya sāvadhāno hṛṣīkeśam idaṃ vakṣyamāṇaṃ vākyam āha / hṛṣīka(m) itīndriyagrāmākhyā tadīśaṃ7 hṛṣīkeśam iti / he mahīpata iti dhṛtarāṣṭrodbodhanaṃ sañjayena8 //
/ na ca sukhāni kāṅkṣe / kasmād ity āha --- he govinda (rā)jyena bhogaiḥ sukhādibhir vā kiṃ naḥ6 kṛtyam / sarvaṃ vā rājyabhogādikaṃ yaj jīvitopakaraṇaṃ7 tenāpi kiṃ prayojanam iti //
/ yasmād eṣām ubhayasainyāśritakulānāṃ pitaraḥ dharmyasantānābhāval luptapiṇḍodakakriyā6 bhavanti / piṇḍaś ca udakaṃ ca piṇḍodake tayoḥ kriyāḥ tā luptā yeṣāṃ te

6. viḍmaḥ 7. vāneva 8. jijoviṣāmaste^ 9. pramusto dhartarāṣṭrāḥ 10. ^pekṣayābhyupayuktidyotanārthaḥ 11. ^vamaśinā sarvanāmnā padya jayema yadi vā no nayeyurityetadvākyatvayābhidheyorthaḥ pratyavamṛṣyate 12. ^svargāvakīkṛtya 13. ^maspākamityartho vivakṣataḥ 14. tadvākyadvatyābhidheyayorvalayo^ 15. niṇormate

kadācid asādhāraṇyahetuḥ śakyate kenacid darśayitum / anāditvasyāsmatpakṣe 'py aviśeṣād aṇuparimāṇāś ca jīvā iṣyante6 / kasmāt / utkrāntigatyāgatiśruteḥ / liṅgaśarīrasya ca saṅkocavikāsadharmiṇor aṇurūpatvād aupādhikam aṇutvaṃ7 jīvasya gīyate / paramātmarūpeṇa tu sarvagatatvaṃ jīvasyeti

vyabhicārād avastutvaṃ prasajyate / bhāvabuddhir abhāvān nivartate bhāvābhāvayoḥ parasparavirodhāt / atha (yathā) sadbuddhiḥ sattāṃ6 jñāpayati tathā ghaṭādibuddhir apīndriyajanyatvāviśeṣād anuvṛttivyāvṛttipratyayagrāhyatvāc
/ kiṃ tat / yena sarvam idaṃ tataṃ
--- tatra yāgena svargaṃ prāpnuyād ity ayam evaiko 'rtho

ca nipuṇataraṃ vakṣyate / brāhmaṇasyeti ca sāmānyaśravaṇaṃ na sanyāsina iti viśiṣṭam / tasmāt sarvāśramāṇāṃ sarvadvijānāṃ ca muktiḥ / tathā ca janakādayaḥ smaryante / tasmād vyavasāyātmikāyāṃ6 buddho sthātavyam iti sthitam //
jñānasāmānyam astīti / ataḥ kvacit pradhānam iti / etāvān viśeṣo 'tra --- samuccayaḥ
/ karmabhyo bhūtāni bhūtebhyaḥ karmeti / tatra yaḥ karma na karoti tena jagaccakraṃ nānuvartitaṃ bhavati / nimittākaraṇān naimittikam
na vidyate / kim ataḥ paraṃ sādhyaṃ syāt / iyaṃ hi phalāvasthā jñānakarmasamuccayānuṣṭhānasya //
/ kimprayojanam / (ya)smād asakto hy ācaran karma paraṃ paramātmānam āpnoti pūruṣaḥ6 //

/ kāryakāraṇayoś cānanyatvāt tadātmakatvaṃ6 pratipadya tatprāptaye kalpata ity adhyātmacetasā phalaprārthanarahitaḥ / nirgataṃ mamatvaṃ yasyāsau nirmamaḥ / nāsti me karma brahmaṇa eva tat kṛtaṃ mayi / evaṃ7 saṅkalpo bhūtvā yuddhyasva vigataśoka iti //

/ jñānavān api prakṛter anurūpaṃ ceṣṭate / prakṛtir janmāntarakṛtaṃ6 karma vāsanārūpeṇa7 cetasy avasthitaṃ vāsasīva rāgaḥ / tatra prakṛtim eva yānti bhūtāni / nigrahaḥ śāstrakṛto niyamo 'nuśāsanam idaṃ kartavyam idaṃ neti / sa teṣāṃ kiṃ8 kariṣyati / ato yuktaṃ kecin me mataṃ nānuvartanta
/ upaniṣaduktaparamātmajñānopāsanābhyāṃ6 yāvajjīvaṃ kṛtābhyāṃ svāśramavihitakarmayajñābhyāṃ7 muktir iti sthitam / ihāpi ca yajñānuṣṭhānād
vāryate / akarmaṇi6 kāmye pratiṣiddhe ca karmaphalabhāvaṃ7 kāmye svargapaśvādi yathāśrutaṃ pratiṣiddhe ca narakapātādir vigarhaṇāṃ8 ca /
brahmarūpaṃ pratipadyate / karmāpi brahmaiva tatprabhavatvāt / yo
sa eva tad abhavat tatharṣīṇāṃ tathā manuṣyāṇām --- iti śruteḥ / brahmaivāgnis tasmin yajñaṃ6 svam ātmānam antaḥkaraṇaṃ7 vivakṣitam / na jīvaḥ8 / yat kiñcij jñeyaṃ9 jānātīti yajña ity ātmavacano 'tra
samarpayati sa nityasannyāsīti boddhavyaḥ6 / sa cetthaṃlakṣaṇaḥ karmastho 'pi nirdvandvo rāgadvaṣādirahitaḥ sukham
sannyāsaśabdena sannyāsī lakṣyate / atra arśāditvān matvarthīyo 'kāraḥ6 / yathā pāpebhya iti tadvān

tayāreka^ ---va 3. satrya sa ---va 4. ... vidhabhaktenirdegātrāsāvāpravyasta^ ---va 5. atha tatra ---la/va 6. manvathīyo ---va 7. tadyanucyate ---va 8. sannyāsī brahma ... muniḥ --- aṃśo'yaṃ ---vakoṣe nāsti 9. ... velāmabhedaddarśansthā ---va 10. samānaphalatvam ---va 11. togasya ---va 12. ... dvete darśane ---va 13. ... śuddhirvijitātmā ---va 14. rjirtadriyaḥ ---va
kuṇapaṃ6 vahet / kiṃ ca bhedavijñānopaśamāt sarvakarmatyāgāc ca muktim anvicchatā saiva nāstīti pratijñātaṃ7 syāt / aśakyatvāt / yathā samudre taraṅgāpanayād aśakyaṃ
tyāgakarmayogayor bhinnapuruṣaviṣayatvāt kutaḥ6 praśnāvatāro bhāgavataṃ cottaraṃ nāma (prati)padyate / naiḥśreyasakarāv
tad eva kartṛ tatphalaṃ ca tad evety ekatvam anudṛśya pūrvam anuṣṭhānāvasthāyāṃ6 paścāl labdhajyotiḥ7 paramātmabhūtaḥ sukham
/ na hi tasya kartṛtvādyāpādane lokasya prayojanam
/ pradarśanārtham etat / gṛhasthādīnām athavā yatīnāṃ yatnavatām / tasyaiva nirvacanaṃ6 yatacetasām iti / abhito nikaṭe samīpakāla ity arthaḥ / nirvāṇaṃ
/ pūrvair eva ca vacanaiḥ6 prāptasya niragner akriyasya (ca) pratiṣedhārthaṃ7 nānyo 'sya vākyasyārtho 'sti / yathā ---
/ pramathituṃ6 śīlam asyeti pramāthi / balavad vegavad dṛḍhaṃ bhedavāsanayā ghanīkṛtam7 / tasyāhaṃ nigrahaṃ8 nirodham ātmany avasthānam / vāyor iva suduṣkaraṃ manye //
/ tasmād ubhayabhraṣṭaḥ / kiṃ śāradābhram iva vṛṣṭirahitaṃ naśyati kiṃ vā neti / apratiṣṭho na vidyate pratiṣṭhā yasya / brahmaṇaḥ pathi brahmaprāptimārge vimūḍho na(śyati) //

---la/va 8. eta dve ---va 9. ^bhoktūrūpeṇāvatiṣṭate ---va 10. mūtāni ---va 11. satsambandhinyau ---va 12. prabhavajyasmāditi ---va 13. prālīyate ---va 14. sa ātmeṅkṛtyātmaśabdābhyāṃ parāmaśeścetanaṃ ---va 15. mahyanumānena ---va 16. kaścitsamartha ... duṣṭatvāt aṃśoyaṃ nāsti ---vakoṣe
tatsamaś cābhyadhikaś ca vidyate / parāsya śaktir
iti viśeṣaṇam anarthakam / nety ucyate / arthavad eva (tat_/) katham ---
īśvarānuśāsanād yāvad adhikāram avasthitir bhavati / tatra ca jñānaśeṣam abhyasyatāṃ prārabdhaphalakarmakṣaye muktiḥ / yo yo devānāṃ pratyabuddhyata sa sa
tatrānadhikāro darśitaḥ7 / tathā ca tenaiva tatroktam
lābhārthaṃ yadi (te) hanyeran / tatra trailokyarājyasyāpi hetor na hantum

/ atas tvaṃ hṛdayasyālpasāratvaṃ7 kṣudram alpavastubhūtaṃ nyūnahṛdayatvaṃ8 kāpuruṣasevitaṃ tyaktvā rathopasthād uttiṣṭha / utthāya ca yuddhāya sajjo bhavety āśayaḥ9 / parantapety anenārjunaṃ protsāhayati //
yān eva dhārtarāṣṭrān hatvā jīvituṃ necchāmaḥ7 kṛpālutayā ta evāsmākaṃ pramukhe sammukhe sthitā iti / etac cārjunasya sambhramaparidevanaṃ hastādyabhinayena //

10. dāṣo ... pṛchāmi 11. ^sammūvacetāḥ 12. yacheyassyān ... vrūhi ... tvāṃ tpapannam 13. ^mitraravajanān .... dhrātāṃ daṣṭvā 14. ^dośopahata 15. kāryaṇayamaurtitya pratipakṣabhūtadaityaṃ 16. doṣaravenopahato duṣitassattva^ 17. dharmessamūḍhaṃ alavupratipatti ceto pasya sohaṃ pṛcchāmi tvā parmeśreyasyāntanma svantissanṛgghaṃ vrūhīti /
/ nāhaṃ7 kadācin nāsam api tv āsam eva / na tvaṃ nāsīr asīr evety arthaḥ /
/ svābhāvikena paramātmarūpeṇa kṣetrajño7 vyapadiśyata iti / kasmād evaṃ8 vyākhyāyate / tadvināśāśaṅkāanirākaraṇaparatvād asya prakaraṇasya / na hy atra brahmopāsanam
/ tad akṛtvā vināśina ity eva vaktavyam abhipretāvināśasiddheḥ /
bhavati bhūtvā ca na bhavati sa janmavināśābhyāṃ yujyate yathā ghaṭādir iti / sattāpi janmapūrvikā ghaṭasyevāsya neṣyate / niravadhikaivāsya
/ ṣaḍbhāvavikāranivṛttiparāṇi na jāyata ityādīny akṣarāṇi / liṅgaṃ sāmarthyam ucyate / tac ca śabdānāṃ tāvanmātre
/ na ca prakṛtārthopayogitvam asyāḥ7 kalpanāyāḥ / kiṃ ca ---
/ padārthasaṃsargo hi vākyārthaḥ / na punar yāgānuṣṭhānena7 jñānayogyatāṃ kuryād
kṛtsnavede / ataḥ kāmyakarmābhiyogaṃ7 vihāya jñānakarmanityakarmapratipādanaparabhoge 'bhiyogavatā bhavitavyam iti /
yujyasva / kaḥ punar yogaḥ / (yogaḥ) karmasu kauśalam / idaṃ tāvad brahmaṇi7 samarpaṇaṃ karmaṇaḥ phalasaṅkalparahitatā ca //
phalāni chādayantaḥ praśnam uttaraṃ cānyathā varṇayanti / prajahāti yadā --- ity

karma kartavyam uktam iti śrutismṛtinyāyanipuṇāḥ pratyācakṣate7 / (te)naivam api yojayituṃ8 śakyate --- sāṅkhyānāṃ jñānād eva niḥśreyasam uktam ātmanaś ca karma kartavyam uktam iti vivekenārjuno 'vagatavān yadi tat kathaṃ tasyākulībhāvaḥ --- tad ekaṃ10 vada --- iti ca nopapadyate / bhāgavataṃ cottaraṃ11 na saṅgacchate --- dviprakāroktā niṣṭheti /
/ yogaś ca tatra --- karma(su) kauśalam --- ity uktaṃ na paropāsanam ity alaṃ prasaṅgena //
nāśitaṃ bhavatīty arthaḥ / so 'yam aghāyuḥ pāpāyur indriyair ārāma ākrīḍā viṣayeṣu7 yasyāsau indriyārāmāḥ8 / moghaṃ vṛthaiva he
laukikaṃ vaidikaṃ vā karoti tad eva pramāṇīkṛtya loko 'nuvartate7 //
bhagavato 'pi manuṣyaśarīre7 (va)rtamānasya dharmādhikārāt karmasannyāsānupapatteḥ8 / karmaṇi pravṛtto9 hi manuṣyaśarīraṃ vihāya devo vā paramātmā vā saṃvṛtto yadā tadā tasyādhikārābhāvaḥ / tad
prādurbhāvarūpāṇi / mayi sarvāṇi --- iti vacanam idānīṃ siddhaṃ7 bhavati / anyathā
(guṇaḥ / atha) karma adhyāpanādi brāhmaṇasya raṇādi7 rājanyasya kṛṣyādi
/ atrocyate / ayam atrābhiprāyaḥ7 --- vītatṛṣṇatvam alepakāraṇam / anyo 'pi yaḥ svavyāpāre vītatṛṣṇaḥ parameśvarārpitakarmaṇi8 pravartate so 'pi karmabhir na badhyata iti yuktataram
/ na hi karmaśabdenātmābhidhīyate / tadānīṃ karmaṇīty api
/ na hi sarvalokapratyakṣā kriyā pratyākhyātuṃ śakyety
kurvatā brahmaiva gantavyaṃ prāptavyam / brahmātmakaṃ karma brahmakarma tasmiṃ karmaṇi samādhir
samānayanaṃ7 samānakarma / ūrdhvanayanam udānakarma / ātmani saṃyama evāgnis tasmin
suṣumṇā nāḍī / taddvāreṇa bāhyaṃ7 vāyumantaḥ praveśayanti / ādityamaṇḍalād ārabhya hṛdaye
iti ārabhya / atra punaḥ kevalād eva karmaṇo mokṣaḥ syād ity āśaṅkya nirasyate / asti cedam api darśanam / yājñikānāṃ keṣāñcin mokṣo nāma svarga eva tāratamyāvasthitaḥ7 / sa ca
kā cāvidyeti / devā śuśrūṣā / jñānino 'pi santaḥ kecid
/ niyataṃ kuru karma tvam --- iti ityādinā --- vidvān yuktaḥ

/ na ca karmābhāvo bhogahetuḥ sarveṣāṃ prasaṅgāt / tad etad bhāgavatam uttaraṃ karmayoginām upapadyate nānyeṣām / śāśvatīḥ bahvīḥ7 samāḥ saṃvatsarān śucīnām ācāravatāṃ śrīmatām aiśvaryavatāṃ gehe jāyate / adhikāratas tasyāpekṣayā pakṣāntaram ucyate / athavā yoginām eva yogābhyāsaratānāṃ daridrāṇāṃ kule vaṃśe jāyate / dhīmatām utpadyate / dhīmatām etad dhi durlabhataram īdṛśaṃ janma // 42-43 //8

sthūlaśarīrārambhiṇyaḥ / mano buddhir ity antaḥkaraṇaṃ nirdiśyate / manograhaṇena bāhyam api karaṇaṃ gṛhyate buddhīndriyakarmendriyalakṣaṇam7 / ahaṅkāra ity anātmany ātmābhimāna ātmani cānātmābhimānaḥ /
/ māyayānantaroktayā prakṛtyāpahṛtajñānā āsuraṃ bhāvaṃ śāṭyānṛtādilakṣaṇam āśritāḥ //
tathaivobhayoḥ senayor anyān svajanān bhrātṝṃ tattulyān sutān pautrān (apaśyat)5 //
/ na ca rājyaṃ kāṅkṣe / rājye hi sati sukhāni bhavantīti cet tan
jñeyam avaśyaṃ jñeyam ity arthaḥ5 / kimbhūtair asmābhiḥ6 / kulakṣayakṛtadoṣam anvagacchadbhiḥ7 //
yadi vā te no 'smān jayeyur abhibhaveyur
/ nanv acetanatvād antaḥkaraṇasya saṃvedanaṃ nopapadyate / cetanatvāt kṣetrajñasamavetasyaivāyaṃ vikāraḥ5 /

iti kim atrāścaryam / na hi viṣayendriyālokasaṃskārasāmarthyatāyāṃ satyāṃ5 ghaṭabuddhiḥ kadācit kasyacin notpadyate / kiṃ ca kāryatvād (ghaṭatva)buddhiḥ kāraṇam apekṣate6 / ghaṭajñānasya ghaṭaḥ kāraṇaṃ nānyad iti / yathā bījāṅkuraḥ7 kāraṇaṃ bījam apekṣate dhūmaś cāgnim evam
arjunasyānyeṣāṃ ca jñānasahitāt svadharmānuṣṭhānān niḥśreyasam upadekṣyāmīti5 //
bhavati / kiṃ tarhi / bhūtvaiva bhavitā / bhūtakāle 'pi sattāṃ na babhārety arthaḥ / yas tv
/ na ca tatrāścaryavad draṣṭavya5 ity artho 'bhidhīyate / na cākṣaramātra(sā)dṛśyāt pradeśāntaragato 'rthaḥ śakyaḥ

--- jayājayau / jaye lābho viparya(ye) alābha iti / (i)dam uktaṃ kurvan na pāpaṃ5 pratyavāyam avāpsyasīsi / tad evopasaṃhṛtam6 / anyathā papaśaṅkānupapatter iha svadharmaṃ7 kurvato yat pāpaṃ8 bhavati tan niṣidhyate9 / atha vā pāpam iti saṃsāravyasanam / tan naivam avāpsyasi / jñānakarmasamuccayānuṣṭhānam evam

/ na ca tā ātmopāsanāḥ / atra ca śokamohākulitacetasas tadapanayanāyātmayāthātmyavarṇanārthaṃ5 prakaraṇam / evaṃ ca kvodgīthādayaḥ kvedaṃ6 prakaraṇam / na ca sāṅkhyaśabdaḥ paribhāṣayā vinātimokṣādiṣu varteta / tasmāt
nātirocate / na hi svargakāmo yajeta --- ity asya vākyasya dvāv
vacanāntareṇa --- tam evaṃ vedānuvaca(ne)na --- iti niyatasya tu sannyāsaḥ karmaṇo5 nopapadyate --- iti ca tyāgapratiṣedhāt teṣām

/ kena tuṣṭaś caratīty āha --- ātmany evānandasvarūpe 'mohitenātmanāntaḥkaraṇena5 janmamaraṇajamohādiviṣādena mahauṣadhabrahmāmṛtapānāsvādajanitapremaprabandhaniścalavṛttinā parituṣṭaḥ6 sthitaprajñas tadocyate /

/ na karmaṇā prajayā dhanena tyāgenaikenāmṛtatvam ānaśuḥ --- ity atra prajāsāhacaryāl lokaprāptyarthaṃ kāmyakarmatyāgo gīyate / itarāpi śrutiḥ5 --- nyāsam eṣāṃ tapasātiriktam āhuḥ --- iti nyāsaśabdena tatra brahmābhidhīyate na karmatyāgaḥ / prakṛtāṃ vācam ity atra damaśamādīnāṃ tapasāṃ ca tatprāptisādhanatvāt tadapekṣayātiriktavacanam6 / prāptavyaṃ hi prāptisādhanād atiriktaṃ bhavati / anyaiś ca sannyāsaśabdo 'tra nyāsaśabdasyānarthāntare prayuktaḥ / yathā ājyaiḥ
--- na ca sannyasanād eva --- ity atiricyate / karmatyāgam āśaṅkya ---
/ yat kiṃ cid etat / karmaṇaś ca yathā bandhahetutvaṃ5 nāsti tathā vakṣyāmaḥ //
--- anena prasaviṣyadhvam / prasavo vṛddhiḥ / tāṃ prāpnuta / eṣa vo yuṣmākam iṣṭakāmadhug
karma kartavyam eva / na jñānitvābhimānena karma
/ svadharmo 'dhiguṇa iti kartavyatāhīno 'pi yathākathañcid anuṣṭhito 'pi5 śreyān praśastataraḥ6 / kutaḥ / paradharmāt svanuṣṭhāt7 / 8sampūrṇetikartavyatākāt / kasmād etad

hi krodho jāyate / rajoguṇaḥ samudbhava utpattisthānaṃ5 yasya so 'yaṃ rajoguṇasamudbhavaḥ / mahadaśanaṃ yasyāsau mahā(śa)nas trailokyam api grasate / mahāṃś cāsau pāpmā samastavyasanahetur ity arthaḥ / viddhi jānīhi / iha mokṣamārge vairiṇam etam //
/ jñānajā tu siddhir brahmalokā(dāv_a)pi5 bhavati / śrutir api --- tad yo yo devānāṃ6 pratyabuddhyata sa eva tad abhavat (tatha)rṣīṇāṃ tathā manuṣyāṇām7 --- iti / tatraiva jñānaprakarṣam
karma (te) prakarṣeṇa vakṣyāmi / yaj jñātvā kṛtvā5 ca karmaprakaraṇāt --- kuru karmaiva --- iti cānantaraṃ karmānuṣṭhānasya vihitatvān mokṣyase vimokṣase 'śubhāt saṃsāraparivartāt //
vidhyantarābhāvāt / na ca phalāntaraṃ kalpayituṃ śakyaṃ svamanīṣikayā5 / tathā coktam

bhojanādau kartṛtvam anubhavan vaidike karmaṇi5 kathaṃ kartṛtvaṃ na pratipadyeta / tad idaṃ rājaputraceṣṭitam / yadi vaidike karmaṇi6 brahmajñānavirodhāt kartṛtvaṃ nivṛttaṃ7 tathā laukike 'pīty aviśeṣaḥ8 / atha vobhayatrāpi kartṛtvaṃ na labhyam
ślokena siddheti na kṛtsnaṃ prakaraṇaṃ stutyartham / na ca vidhim antareṇa stutiḥ kvacid arthavatī / kiñca vidyamānena (guṇena) pādakaṃ6 tarhi śāstraṃ na stutiparam /
/ prakarṣe(ṇa) nipatya pātaḥ praṇipātas tena dīrghanamaskārādinā ca taj
/ yogena brahmārpaṇanyāyena paramātmani sannyastaṃ samyag nyastam ekīkṛtaṃ karma yenātmajñānena5 ca (samyak) chinnaḥ saṃśayo
sāṅkhyaśabdaḥ5 sannyāsavivakṣayā prayukta ity avirodhaḥ / kṛtvā karmāṇīśvare yaḥ6 samarpayati sa sannyāsī / sāṅkhyo na kāpilo niragnir niṣkriyaś
naiva kurvann akārayan / dehasambandhasya nivṛttatvāt tadānīṃ tatkāryābhāvaḥ5 / prāgavasthāyāṃ tu dehasambandhānuvṛttteḥ6 kurvan kārayaṃś

sa yogī ca / sa sannyāsī --- mayi sarvāṇi karmāṇi --- ity uktalakṣaṇo5 yogī ca --- brahmārpaṇam --- iti / na niragnir nirastāgniḥ / akriyas tyaktakarmā / naivaṃvidhaḥ6 sannyāsī yogī ca yaḥ7 / (i)ha vidyayā saha sambandho nakartuḥ8 / sāṅkhyānāṃ prasiddhas tyaktakarmā caturthāśramī so 'tra pratiṣidhyate / yo hi buddhipūrvaṃ9 kartavyaṃ na karoti nāsāv āśrāmī / prāyaścittī hi saḥ / tena saha
--- atīndriyaprajñābhir ity arthaḥ / duratyayā duḥkhenātyayo 'tikramo 'syā iti duratyayā / yady evaṃ śāstropadeśānarthakyam / neti brūmaḥ / mām eva ye prapadyante te māyāṃ tarantīti na doṣaḥ //
// kuṇḍa iti tāni akṣarāṇi tatpatrānte yoga iti / avyahitaparapatrārambhe prathamapaṅktau si tvat na ceti iti dvitīyapaṅktau vartante
anukūlāni paśyāmi / yad vā gātrāvasādādīni nimittāni paśyāmi / na cāhave bandhuvargaṃ16 hatvopakāram anupaśyāmi //
nāsti bhinnakartṛkatā / hananaprītyor hy ekakartṛkatā16 / yata ātatāyinaḥ kilaite kathan naḥ prītiḥ syād ity
droṇādayo 'smāsu maitryāṃ vartamānatvān mitrāṇi / teṣāṃ drohe jighāṃsāyāṃ
bhavanti / tāsu duṣṭāsu varṇeya jāyate varṇasaṅkaraḥ / varṇaś cāsau saṅkaraś ceti / aśuddho varṇa ity arthaḥ //

tad eva doṣas tenopahato dūṣitaḥ sattvadhairyātmakaḥ16 svabhāvo yasya sa tathoktaḥ / tathā dharme sammūḍham apratipattiṃ gataṃ ceto yasya so 'haṃ pṛcchāmi tvāṃ parameśvaram / yan me śreyaḥ syāt tan me niścitam asandigdhaṃ
12. vyathayantye puruṣa 13. na cālapanti 14. mamesukha^ samuduḥkhaṃ 15. yogyebhivatīty arthaḥ 16. venāśopatti^ kyāha
eva grāhakaṃ pratyakṣam ity abhipretya tasya tad apy apākṛtaṃ16
gītāḥ sarvā na saṅgaccheran16 / ato neyaṃ mṛṣāśā17 kartavyā /
/ tasmād ātmatattvamuktalakṣaṇaṃ16 samyagavadhāryaṃ tan na vismaraṇīyam ityabhiprāyaḥ /
karmaṇā so 'tikramaḥ / abhikrama iti kecit paṭhanti16 / arthas tu sa eva /
tāni sahasvety arthaḥ / sattvaguṇastho bhūtvā dhairyam avalambya / niryogakṣemaś ca / aprāptasya svīkaraṇaṃ yogaḥ prāptasya pari(rakṣaṇaṃ) kṣemaḥ / tayor
tatparityāge na kenāyaṃ preritaḥ / pāpam evānudhāvatīty arjuna uvāca ---
/ na cātra --- mano brahma --- itivad brahmadṛṣṭyā kārakopāsanaṃ16 codyate kiṃ
/ udgīthāvayavasyauṅkārasya16 varṇātmakasyopāsanaṃ tatra vidhīyate śrutatvān na brahmopāsanam iti sthitam / tena --- iyam --- ity etasyaiva stutyartham iti vyākhyātam ity alaṃ prasaṅgena //

/ tad eva cintyata ity arthaḥ / evaṃ ca paramārthata ekaṃ sāṅkhyaṃ ca yogaṃ ca yaḥ paśyati sa paśyati / tārkikāṇāṃ tu --- kāpilāḥ16 sāṅkhyāḥ / teṣām anyad darśanam / yogā naiyāyikāḥ prasiddhās teṣām anyad darśanam iti /
tathā vartase / bhikṣāṭanādi vyāpāraṃ16 karoṣi / ataś
phaleṣu --- tyaktvā karmaphalāsaṅgam iti / yasya hi bhagavān pramāṇabhūtas taduktatvād eva pratipadyate / kiṃ stutyā / atha (a)pramāṇaṃ tathā stutir api vyarthā / na cātra stutiparatvaṃ vākyasya
kevalenātyantātīndriyaṃ jagatkāraṇaṃ kaścit samarthayituṃ śaktaḥ / asiddhānaikāntikaviruddhadoṣaduṣṭatvāt16 /
nādravyam / vedasmṛtiliṃ gebhyaḥ19 kila brāhmaṇasyaiva mukhyayā vṛttyā mokṣādhikāro 'vagamyate na kṣatriyavaiśyayoḥ yogābhyāsādhikāre saty
tyaktvāste sukhaṃ19 vaśī jitendriyaḥ20 / kva punar āste tadā navadvāre śarīre / naiva kurvan na kārayann
la/va 3. takṣānamityu^ ---va 4. tābhyāṃ pante ---va 5. vrāhmarṇavat pūjyatamatvāhograhaṇam ---va 6. samadarśanasteṣu ---va 7. ... gatavaśyatīty arthaḥ
hi śrutismṛtyuktapraśastayamaniyamapramukhayogāṅgādisambhavād upāsakatvena ca teṣām eva niyamāt ta eva
9. veti 10. kartu 11. sāvayuvasyāvapava^ 12. tasmādubhavapyetāvajño 13. ... mātreṇottka hetvapekṣāyāṃ yasmāmapi bhāvavikārāṇāmātmanyubhāvā ... / mācaṣṭe
karmaṇy akarma yaḥ paśyet phalābhāvam / akarmaṇi nitye karmāpavargānuguṇaṃ phalaṃ20 paśyed iti /
yojayanti / tathā ca smṛtiḥ --- nityaṃ sugandhasnānaśīlaḥ
/ nātmano nityaśuddhatvāt / na śarīrasya mamedam iti
---va/19 la 8. ... dṛrśināṃ ---va 9. nirdeṣaṃ hi saṃmaṃ ---va 10. vuḍyā ---va 11. brahmeva ---va 12. lavanakṣetre --va 13. yasmāttasmūratterjita iti ---va 14.

kilādhikāravyavasthā dharmādharmavyavasthāvan na pramāṇāntaragamyā / ko hi nāma bhagavato dharmasya hetuto niścayam avadhārituṃ śaktaḥ10 / hetutaś ca dharmavyavasthāyāṃ (kariṣyamāṇāyāṃ) hetvanavasthānād dharmānavasthānam api prasajyeteti / ataś ca
hi / iti / ṣaṇḍasya10 klībasya pūrvajanmārjitaduṣṭakarmasūcakatvena11 duṣkṛtitvād anadhikāro dāyādivibhāgapratiṣedhāt

/ mahānta uttamāḥ praśastāḥ / tathā yudhi yuddhe bhīmārjunābhyāṃ yoddhṛtvena10 samās tulyāḥ / ke ta ity āha yuyudhānaḥ sātyakiḥ virāṭo11 drupadaś ca mahārathaḥ / mahān preraṇāvaraṇayuddhāpasāraṇāvakāśādidharmayogāt12 praśasto ratho yasyāsau mahārathaḥ //
harṣam utpādayan bhīṣmaḥ kurūṇāṃ tatkālajānāṃ pūrvavayāḥ siṃhanādam ucchair
bhīmakarmā bakahiḍimbādirākṣasavidāraṇādīni bhīṣaṇāni karmāṇi yasya (saḥ) / kuntīputragrahaṇaṃ praśaṃsārtham / pitur asaṃvijñāne mātrā vyavadeśo yady api
bhagavān ubhayoḥ senayor madhye rathaṃ sthāpayitvovāca / kathaṃ sthāpayitvety āha bhīṣmadroṇapramukhataḥ10 tayoḥ sammukham / ādyāditvāt (sārvavibhaktikaḥ) tasiḥ11 / sarveṣāṃ
bhedabuddhiṃ janayatīti / api ca kṛpāvaśāt prayatnaśaithilye saty avaṣṭambhaṃ10 dhārayituṃ na śaknomi / duḥkhaprakarṣāc ca cakrārūḍham

10. tṛṣīkeśaḥ 11. bhāita 12. ... rubhayārmadhye 13. namarjunaṃ 14. saktotsāhaṃ tṛṣīkeśo 15. vakṣyamāṇa vāvmāha 16. mahātmāna 17. arjunamatmājñānopadeśamantareṇa tannivṛtto sambhavā^ ttadupadeṇaya prasaṅga^ ^vāca10 18. vīkṣya
/ ko 'sāv upāyaḥ / jñānapūrvikā titikṣā / tad āha tāṃs titikṣasva iti sahasvety arthaḥ10 //
maṇisamavāyināṃ parasparavirodhād vikriyā / vikriyā hi nāma vināśa upamardaḥ10 / tathātmana iti / nābhāvo vināśo vidyate / sata ātmanaḥ so 'ham iti pratyabhijñānān nityatvopapatter anityahetoś
/ vikāraś ca (pratyakṣādibhiḥ) pramāṇair nirūpyamāṇo nāstitāṃ pratipadyate / yathā ghaṭādiḥ svakāraṇavyatirekeṇānupalabdher asan evaṃ sarvo vikāra
mithyāhetur iti durupadeśo 'yam / kas tarhi mithyāhetuḥ kāraṇadoṣo 'bādhakapratyayo vā / tathā
pratipādyate / jñānasvarūpasyopāsanaṃ ṣaṣṭe ('dhyāye) vidhā(pa)yiṣyata iti jīvasvarūpam evedānīṃ vaktavyam / kasmād avināśīty
/ na ca sannyasanād eva jñānarahitāt siddhiṃ
/ yataḥ svadharme vartamānasya saṅgrāmādau nidhanaṃ maraṇaṃ śreyaḥ paradharmakṛtād udayāj jīvanād ity arthaḥ / apir abhyupagame / yady

viṣayasaptamī / na punar adhikaraṇasaptamī10 / yathā śarāve badarāṇīti11 / tad etat paśyet vicārayet / jñātvā caitad ubhayaṃ parihared iti / sa buddhimān adhyātmaśāstravihitabuddhitvāt / sa ca yukto yogī kṛtsnakarmakṛt / kṛtsna
/ tasmād avyutpannavipralabdhabuddhiṣu10 vyākhyānam idaṃ śobhate / nāsmāsu ye pramāṇavṛttam
bhagavatā darśitā --- yasya sarve samārambhāḥ --- ity ārabhya /
bhavati / atha viparyayeṇa prāṇe10 recakavṛttau11 pūraṇavṛttiṃ yāvad ādityas tāvac cittavṛttim ūrdhvām
yogam ātiṣṭha brahmārpaṇanyāyena karmānutiṣṭha / utthiṣṭha ca / kim āsse viṣaṇṇamanā10 iveti /
phalam / sannyāsināpi bhedena karma kṛtvā samarpaṇakāle bhedadarśanam evāśrīyate / sarvaṃ karma brahmaprabhavaṃ tad brahmasvarūpam
/ atha nyāyataḥ so 'pi nāsti / katham / yadi tāvad ātmajñānakarmayogayor
/ teṣu vidyamāneṣu naimittikaṃ10 bhedajñānaṃ kāyikaṃ (mānasikaṃ vācikaṃ) ca trividhaṃ karmāvaśyaṃ pravartate / agnīndhanasaṃyoge dhūmavat tasmāj jñānakarmaṇor virodhād
/ tasmād yogī brahmaṇi niḥkṣipya karma kurvan mucyata ity upasaṃhārāthaṃ vacanam etat //
/ tenātmaupamyenātmasādṛśyenety arthaḥ / sarvatra bhūteṣu sukhaṃ10 vā paśyati / samam / yathā mama sukhaṃ priyaṃ tathānyeṣām / yathā me duḥkham apriyaṃ tathā pareṣām iti / sa yogī paramo mataḥ //
yogī saṃśuddhakilbiṣaḥ10 yogena (yā)tīti smaranti yogaśāstravidaḥ / kiṃ punaḥ kṣudrapāpāni / na hy ekasminn
yo māṃ sa me yuktatamo mata iti //
/ yaj jñānaṃ10 jñātvā neha loke jñātavyaṃ punar avaśiṣyate //
tāḍitāḥ / sa ca vāditrasaṅghātajaḥ śabdas tumulo mahān
paridahyate / na ca śaknomy avasthātuṃ bhramatīva ca me manaḥ //
no 'smākaṃ purato yoddhuṃ14 sthitāḥ / tat ko nāma buddhipūrvakārī niṣprayojanaṃ rājyādi priyaṃ kuryān na
/ prītir iti yady api kṛdabhihito bhāvo dravyavad
tatrāvasthitasya (ātmanaḥ) dehāntaraprāptiḥ / tatra dhīro dhīmān na muhyati / yadi tarhy avināśitvam ātmanas tad idānīṃ vṛthā te śokaḥ14 samupasthitaḥ katham //
10. kaumāra 11. mutvati 12. balyayauvana 13. tathānityasyaivāva^ 14. ^dānīmanyathā me śokaḥ 15. kathaṃ śatokṣmādi kṛtaiḥ 16. tattva
svasmād ātmasvarūpāt / same duḥkhasukhe yasya / yaṃ samaduḥkhasukhaṃ14 na cālayanti so 'mṛtatvāya mokṣāya kalpate samartho yogyo bhavatītyathaḥ15 //
/ san ghaṭaḥ san pataḥ14 iti / tatra viśeṣyaviṣayā buddhir ghaṭādiviṣayā satpaṭādau15 vyabhicārān mithyābuddhiḥ / yā punar viśeṣaṇaviṣayā sadbuddhiḥ sā sarvatra vṛtter
vyatirekād dhetuvacanam aprameyasyeti / kasmād ātmā nityaḥ / aprameyatvād deśataḥ (kālataś_ceti) sa svadharme pravarta(te)
/ na hanyate hanyamāne śarīra iti vipariṇāmo niṣidhyate / vipariṇāmo 'vasthāntarāpattiḥ yathā śaśasya māṃsāvasthā /

kriyate / tasmād yuddhasva bhārata iti tam abhidhāya tatsiddhyartham eva jāyata iti / ārambhād yadi ca sarvakarmatyāga evābhipretaḥ syād ayaṃ śloko 'rjunāya na vaktavyaḥ syāt / bhagavatoktaś ca ṣaḍbhāvavikārarahita ātmā / yadi viduṣaḥ karmāsambhavaṃ ced
ta eva sutarām avipaścito na mīmāṃsakā14 ye śabdapramāṇavṛttaṃ15 bruvate śamadamādayo yāgānuṣṭhānasādhyā
manīṣiṇo manasa īṣiṇo14 brahmabhāvāpāditamanovṛttayo15 janmaiva bandhas tato vinirmuktāḥ16 padaṃ viṣṇoḥ sthānaṃ gacchanty anāmayaṃ sarvopadravarahitam //
lokasaṅgraham eva (tathā)pi sampaśyan kartum arhasi / lokasaṅgraho lokaparipālanam
vītarāgabhayakrodhāḥ / kvacid vastuni snehamātraṃ rāgaḥ / manmayā (mā)m ātmatvenābhiprapannā nityam evaṃ svarūpaṃ
/ nāyaṃ virodhaḥ / saṅkalpamātreṇa jagatsṛṣṭisthitibhaṅgakartṛtvāt kartāraṃ14 strīpuṃyogenedānīṃ evānutpādanād akartāraṃ viddhi / cāturvarṇyagrahaṇaṃ15
/ yathā kila nauyāyināṃ tīragatavṛkṣeṣu gamanabuddhir bhrāntis
na punar uktatā / asya prakaraṇasya viśeṣārthatvāt / karmākarmapravibhāgadvāreṇākarma14 kāmyaṃ pratiṣiddhaṃ ca na kartavyam / nityaṃ ca
kurvataḥ kilbiṣaṃ nāpnotīty aprāptapratiṣedhaprasaṅgaḥ14 / atrābhidhīyate --- vākyatātparyāparijñānam
vidyā vartate / etasyaivākṣarasya praśāsane gārgi sūryācandramasau --- iti śrutiḥ14 kilaitam arthaṃ darśayatīti tad
samyagabhyasta upayujyate / prāṇāpānagatī prāṇāpānavṛttī14 ruddhvā niruddhya yativaccharīraṃ15 kumbhakavṛttyā pūrayitvā kumbhakaprāṇāyām aprāyaṇāḥ16 //
/ yathā samudre sarvā āpaḥ praviśyaikībhavanti tathātmani sarvā(di)kāraṇe sarvo 'yaṃ prapañcaḥ14 praviśyaikībhavatīty arthaḥ / kāryakāraṇayor
/ nāyaṃ doṣaḥ / tāv eva sannyāsayogau sāṅkhyayogaśabdābhyāṃ nirdiṣṭau / yogaśabdas tāvat prakṛtaṃ yogaṃ na
/ yad eva sāṅkhyāḥ14 paśyanti brahma yogais tad
pāyūpasthayor vyāpāraḥ / gṛhṇann iti hastayoḥ / unmeṣanimeṣau14 netrayoḥ / cittaṃ dhārayed yukto manyeta --- ity asyārthe dhārayed
pāyasam ity alam atiprasaṅgena / idaṃ tāvat tattvaṃ śreyo'rthinām uktam / nāsmākaṃ vyasanitā / ye viparītavartmagāminas te sarve pathi
karoti na lipyata iti smṛteḥ / ata eva
/ tad idaṃ cakram eva samāvartate / avyāpṛtāvastheśvaratulyateha
putriṇa ādhānādisaṃyogāt15 klībasyāputriṇo nādhikāraḥ16 / tathā coktam
jīvabhūtaḥ sanātana iti / agnivisphuliṅgavan mahākāśaghaṭākāśavaj jīvaparayor
/ tasyāpi tatsamānam ity apravṛttir eva syāt / uttarāś
tirobhūtaḥ śaktyātmanā punar api kāraṇaṃ praviśati /
iti / tac chrutismṛtinyāyabāhyaṃ15 viruddhaṃ ca / yadi tāvad utpanne jñāne prayojanābhāvāt
/ kena / prakṛtijair guṇaiḥ / prakṛtir mahābhūtānāṃ sūkṣmāvasthā14 / tato jātaiḥ kāryakāraṇaiḥ sattvādiguṇādhiṣṭhitai(r_guṇaiḥ) /

vyāpārān katham asāv ātmaratir ātmatṛpta eva vā syāt / iyaṃ cāvasthā karmatyāgasya bhagavatā viyatā tām etāṃ15 svayam evālocya karma hātavyam anuṣṭheyaṃ (vā) / nānyasyedānīntanasya durupadeśaḥ krotavyaḥ pramāṇīkartavyo (vā) vyāmuhyamānatvād
nyāyena / paramārthatas tu svārtham eva karma kartavyam / kevalasya jñānasyāpavargaṃ prati

janakādibhir apy avaśyaṃ karma kartavyaṃ prāptam / na hi khaṇḍamodakabhakṣaṇāt15 prītyā kaścit karmaṇi pravartate kleśātmakatvā(t) / tasmāt karmaṇā vinā saṃsiddher asambhavāt karma kurv iti gītārthaḥ16 //
nātmani / ātmanas tu sannidhimātreṇāyaskāntavad ayasaḥ15 pravṛttau aupādhikam eva kartṛtvaṃ na

mām eva copāśritāḥ15 / nānyo 'smākaṃ16 śaraṇam astīty ubhayaviśeṣaṇopādānam / yathā kaścit srtīmayo bhavati na śaraṇaṃ prapannaḥ / kiṃ tu rājānaṃ yogakṣemāv ahaṃ jñānatapasā jñānaṃ ca ta(pa)ś ca jñānata(paḥ / ta)yor dvandvaikavadbhāvaḥ17 / sarvo dvandvo ekavad bhavati ---
ity uktam / ke punas te / kena
sarvakriyābuddhir iti / yathā kṣaṇikavādino bauddhā devadattādigantṛvyatirekeṇa gamanakriyāṃ
hi kṣaṇikaṃ karma / tathā --- yo vā etad akṣaram aviditvā
iti / asadvartmani hi prāyeṇa prāṇino rasanta iti //
svatantraḥ / atha āsir audāsīnye dhātur vartate / yathā gṛhaṃ parigṛhyāste / kṣetraṃ parigṛhyāste15 --- ity audāsīnyavacano nopadeśavacanas

---va/la 13. muktaḥ sukhābhisaṃvandhanivṛtte na ca takṛtasya śruśruṣādilaṇasya karmaṇo murūpaṃ phalaṃ sṛjatyāptakāmatvād iti muktasya prāg iva putrabhṛtyakalatrādeniyantavyaseha vidyamānatvāducyate ātmīyasya poṣyabargasya vidhatai kartṛtvābhiniṣedhaḥ /
yogino dṛṣṭāntārtham uktā / vyāpṛtāvasthasya tv īśvarasya jīvakarmānurūpaṃ jagad vidhātṛtvaṃ15 śrutismṛtisiddhaṃ sthitam eva //
kevalaṃ niṣphalaṃ bhavati yāvat pratyutānadhikṛtatvena8 pratyavāyakaratvāt

samīkṣya na kaścid atra paraḥ sarva eva svajanā ity evaṃ vicārya katham ete mārayituṃ yuvatā iti prakṛṣṭayā karuṇayā vaśīkṛtaḥ / tata eva sīdamāno 'vasādaṃ gacchan yuddhodyamaṃ8 jahad idam abravīd iti /
codanīyā / yad vā darśanakriyāyā arjunaḥ kartā gātrādisādanādau ca vāstavena dharmeṇārjuna eva / na hy arjunavyatirekeṇānyad gātrādy

6. dyaśekamchoṣaṇamindriyāṇāṃ 7. ^sapanna^ 8. cādhipantyam 9. hiḥ 10. kāraṇāya 11. yasmādbhūmau 12. niṣkaṃṭhakam 13. tatopi cādhimintvaṃ 14. hanna taṃ 15. vuddhā 16. ... mamaivabhūtasya 17. sarvādhiyate 18. mumṛṣurjlātisamutthaṃ 19. sarvendriyāṇāmindriyavṛttītāmuchoṣaṇaṃ saṅkocakaraṃ 20. pṛchāmīti 21. adhunā ... sañjayaḥ pārthapratijñānā^samāpayaṃ dhatarārṣṭamāha
/ na ca paramātmanaḥ saṃsāritvaṃ yujyate / tasya ca vidyāyogāt vijñānam ānandaṃ brahma iti ca nityākāśānandasvarūpatvāt / tasmād īśvarāṃśāḥ pratiśarīraṃ parasparaṃ
/ avāntarasāmānyam api ghaṭatvagotvādi sarvam abhyupagantavyam / tathā ca vyaktiḥ
iti punaruktam / na tu pṛthivyādivad āpekṣikaṃ nityatvaṃ gauṇaṃ gṛhyate / atyantanityasya mukhyasya nityaśabdārthasyāsambhavād
manyase hantāham eṣām ime mayā hanyanta iti tac ca mṛṣā8 / katham ---

ghaṭādi(bhyo_'sya) vailakṣaṇyam / upasaṃharati --- ajo nitya iti / janmavināśapratiṣedhenaiva madhyavarttino bhāvavikārāḥ pratiṣiddhā8 bhavanti / tathāpi mandabuddhyanugrahārthaṃ9 svaśabdena pratiṣedhati / śāśvata ity apakṣayo niṣidhyate / svāṅgāpacayaḥ sādhanāpacayo
svamataṃ bhagavatyāropya varṇayanti viduṣaḥ sarvakarmapratiṣedha eva prakaraṇārtho 'bhipreto bhagavataḥ (iti) / hantigrahaṇam udāharaṇārtham8 / yāni karmāṇi śāstre

/ vyaktaṃ madhyaṃ yeṣāṃ tāni vyaktamadhyāni / vyaktaṃ sthūlāvasthocyate / kāraṇe pracaratvāt / avyakte nidhanaṃ vināśaḥ9 pralayo yeṣāṃ tāny avyaktanidhanāni svakāreṇa pralīnāni kāryakāraṇasaṅghātātmakāni / tatra kā
sambandhyamāno yo 'rthaḥ sa sāṅkhyaśabdayogyo8 vyākhyeyaḥ / sa cāsmābhir ukta iti /
... pūrvaparyālocanayā 8. sāṅkhyaśabdoyogyovvyākhyeya 9. sa casmābhirukta iti 10. ityuṣasaṃhāravacanādanuṣṭāno pāpavācano 11. ... yukṣasya 12. ... mucyate

/ bhogaḥ sukhavedanā / (aha)m eṣāṃ patiḥ svāmīti yatrābhimāno jāyate tadāiśvaryam / athavā gater evobhayaṃ8 viśeṣaṇam / kīdṛśagatiṃ9 prati / janmakarmaphalapradāṃ kriyāviśeṣabahulāṃ prati / puṣpitāṃ vācaṃ (pra)tīty arthaḥ //

sarvakarmatyāgināṃ sāṅkhyānāṃ jñānād eva kevalān niḥśreyasaḥ prāptir uktā / mama ca --- karmaṇy evādhikāras te --- iti karmaiva kevalam upadiṣṭam / na tata eva śreyaḥprāptir ity ākulitabuddhir arjuna uvāca --- jyāyasī cet --- iti / uttaraṃ

--- ity ājyaśabdaḥ stotreṣu loke ghṛtavacanaḥ8 / tad iha bhrāntyā tasya tyāgārthakatvaṃ9 kalpitam / tathā hi --- dhanimātrakṛto hy eva janānāṃ mativibhramaḥ / paurvāparyāparāmṛṣṭaḥ10 śabdo 'nyāṃ kurute matim // iti / itihāse ca tatra tatra mokṣārthibhiḥ karma kartavyam ity uktam / tathā hi
jñānotpattyupāyatvāt8 karmaṇāṃ / tasmāt karma kartavyam / tato jñānotpattiḥ / tato mokṣa
/ so 'yaṃ guṇā8 dehādayo guṇeṣu svavyāpāreṣu9 svabhāvataḥ pravṛttā iti matvā na sajjate saktiṃ
nityaṃ karmocyate / kiṃ karma kim akarmeti prakramavirodhāt /8
vaktavyam / saptamyantaṃ karmaśabdam anuccāryātmany akarma paśye(d_i)ti8 vaktavyam / vyāmohāyātmany akarma karmābhāvaṃ paśyed ity ukte(ḥ) tatra karma nāstīti gamyate / kiṃ
parigrahabuddhir yasya nāsty asau tyaktasarvaparigrahaḥ / kim idaṃ śārīraṃ nāma / śārīranirvartyam
tena brhamaiva tyaktaṃ bhavati / asmiṃ karmaprakaraṇe8 sarvāsu gītāsu karmapravṛttir
naiḥśreyasakarau / niḥśreyasam eva naiḥśreyasam / ayaṃ tu viśeṣaḥ --- karmasannyāsāt karmayogo viśiṣyate / katham / dvaitaviṣayo8 hi sannyāsaḥ /
--- iti sāṅkhyaśabdopādānaprayojana(m) / tau sāṅkhyayogāv ity arthaḥ / pṛthakphalau

/ sannyāsī brahmaprāptum ayogato duḥkhaṃ (prāptuṃ) śaknuyāt / duḥkham iti kriyāviśeṣaṇam / kliṣṭataram ity arthaḥ / yogenābhedadarśanena yukto muniḥ8 sannyāsī na cireṇa brahmādhigacchati / tasmāt so 'pi samarpaṇavelāyām
buddhivyāpāraḥ / buddhyā paryālocayann ity arthaḥ / śṛṇvann iti śrotrayoḥ / spṛśann iti tvagindriyasya / jighrann
hi tyajyante / sannyāsagrahaṇaṃ8 ca na kuryāt /
/ abhita ubhayata ity eke / jīvatāṃ8 mṛtānāṃ ceti / tad asat / jīvatāṃ cen nirvāṇaṃ9 siddhaṃ mṛtānāṃ daṇḍāpūpikayā siddham iti na vaktavyaṃ mṛtānām iti //

dṛṣṭvā tṛṣyati8 tuṣyatīty arthaḥ / na punas tasyāptakāmasyānyādṛśo9 bhogo 'sti yathā nivedya samarpaṇe10 devatā prīyate / sarveṣāṃ lokānāṃ mahāntaram īśvaram / (suhṛdaṃ) pratyupakārānapekṣayo 'pakāriṇaṃ jñātvā māṃ11 śāntiṃ mokṣam ṛcchati

/ sannyāsitvaṃ8 yogitvaṃ ca (na) yugapad sambhavati / kiṃ ca --- niragnir akriyaś ca sannyāsī prasiddhaḥ / kriyāvān karmayogī / tasmād anyaḥ sannyāsī / karmayogī cānya iti parābhiprāyam āśaṅkyāvirodhaṃ darśayati ---
tadā tasya kā gatir iti praṣṭum uvāca ---
/ hiśabdo hetau / yasya devasya mama māyā nirmīyate na (māyāvikāḥ)8 / na jātam iti prakṛtir

adhikṛtānuṣṭhitāyā12 (eva) phaladātṛtvāvagamāt / avihitena tūtkṛṣṭajātīyakarmaṇā13 yogena jñānena14 ca śūdrādir utkarṣa15 netuṃ na śakyate / na hi kārṣṇāyasaṃ16 bhūyo 'py analasantāpanena suvarṇatvam āpādayituṃ
ity uktaḥ / tenaitad uktaṃ bhavati --- idam agnihotrādi karma
kṛtam / yeṣāṃ ca śabdānām iha lakṣaṇānugamo na dṛśyate teṣāṃ virodho nodbhāvanīyaḥ / yataḥ paramarṣiṇā dvaipāyanenaivoktam alaṅkṛtaṃ śubhaiḥ śabdair iti / atas tad āgamād evāvagamyate
aho dainye / bata khedānukampayoḥ / rājyena yat sukhaṃ tallobhāt svajanavadhapāpavyavasāye
/ madhusūdanārisūdaneti bhaktaḥ punaḥ punar āsthāṃ karoti samakrameṇa //
niṣkaṇṭakaṃ12 sphītaṃ rājyaṃ tato 'pi cādhi(kaṃ surāṇāṃ svā)mitvaṃ13 prāpya ahan na
/ teṣāṃ hi svadharmānuṣṭhānapravṛttatvena12 trivargāsiddher bhāvino 'rthasya13 ca nityatvād aśocyatvam / api ca prajñāvādāṃś ca bhāṣase ---

10. ... nanu śo^ 11. aśocanīyān .... anuśocitavāsi 12. teṣāṃ ... hi svadharmānuṣṭānapravṛtvena 13. bhāmbinorthasya 14. ... dasmātchreya^ 15. bhaidamapīha 16. dati 17. yasmādbhūta prā^ 18. pariniṣṭitvajñā^ 19. ... vāditobhipraryate 20. ... dātmano vināśitvāddarśanādaśokaḥ 21. tadvadanavināvināśitvaṃ saṃpadyanmoha
/ pratiśarīraṃ kṣetrajñānāṃ12 bhedāt tadbhedavyapadeśaḥ / ke punar amī kṣetrajñā nāma / paramātmano 'ṃśāḥ13 / tathā ca vakṣyati --- mamaivāṃśo
kṛte sarvaiḥ kṛtaṃ syāt / atha yasya taccharīraṃ12 tasyaiva tad iti cet
/ avināśī vā are 'yam ātmā iti śruteḥ / ubhayoḥ sadasator dṛṣṭo nirṇīto 'nto maryādā
/ purāṇa iti vṛddhila(kṣa)ṇo bhāvavikāraḥ pratiṣidhyate12 / nāyaṃ śaśivat kalābhir
nistraiguṇyo bhava / traiguṇyam ativartasva / katham / nirdvandvaḥ nityasattvasthaḥ12 /

yadi jñānam āhātmyaṃ tadānīm abhyanujñātaṃ jñānasyaitanmāhātmyaṃ yatkāmātmanāṃ12 karma saṃsārahetur bhavati tadātmīyasvabhāvaṃ vihāya tatsamparkād utkarṣahetutvaṃ13 pratipadyate / yathā rasaspṛṣṭatāmravarṇatā14 suvarṇatāṃ pratipadyate / raso 'pi tāmrasamparkāt puruṣārthasādhanam15 / evam anyonyasamuccitam apavargārtham ity
--- karmaṇā manasā vācā yo dharmanirataḥ sadā / aphalākāṅkṣasiddhaś ca sa mokṣam
vṛṣṭipradānādinā / evam anyonyaṃ bhāvayantaḥ śreyaḥ paraṃ svargārthinaḥ svargam apavargārthinopavargaṃ prāpsya(tha)12 //

/ atra ca karmaṇā mokṣaṃ gatā ity ucyate / na punaḥ karmaṇā lokasaṅgrahaṃ kṛtavanta iti / śrutahānir aśrutaparikalpanā caivaṃ syāt / na ca teṣāṃ karma(su) pravṛttatvād iti karmapravṛttau hetuḥ / utpannāyāṃ (karmapravṛttau) ūrddhvaṃ12 sarvo hi pravṛttakarmaiva / yadi
atha ca vartāmy eva ca (karmaṇi) / varta
punar etan nābhinandanti 12sāṅkhyādidarśanavibhrāntacetasas teṣām adhaḥpātaṃ darśayann āha ---
/ tad api pṛthakkartavyatayā vidhīyate śrutau --- vijñāya prajñāṃ kurvīta --- iti / anyathā jñānavijñānaśabdayor arthe bhedo na
paramātmani saṃyojyaikīkṛtya12 brahmarūpeṇāvasthāpya kāmaṃ13 jahīti tātparyārthaḥ14 //
/ rahasyaṃ hy etan mayoktam aprakāśitam / yan mayi bhaktatvasakhitvābhyāṃ12 naitad avajñātum arhasi / idānīṃ
karmābhāvaṃ yaḥ paśyet / na hi paramārthataḥ12 kriyā
nirākṛtāḥ / ahaṅkāravimūḍhātmā12 iti coktam / ataḥ punaruktam iha syāt aprastutaṃ13 ca / karmaprakaraṇaṃ caitad vartate /
/ nanu pratiṣiddham api śarīranirvartyaṃ syāt / naiṣa doṣaḥ / vaidikakarmaprakaraṇāt / kevalam iti ca
brahmārpaṇam ity oṅkāre brahmopāsanam ity upadi(śyate)12 iti vadanti /

dravyamayād agniṣṭomāder jñānayajñaḥ / kutaḥ / sarvaṃ hi jñāne sati parisamāpyate 'pavargāya samarthaṃ12 bhavatīty arthaḥ / tathā ca śrutiḥ --- sa ya ātmānam eva lokam upāste hāsya karma kṣīyate13 --- iti / jñānasahitaṃ karmākṣayaphalatvān na kṣīyata ity ucyate /
bhidyate / sannyāsaḥ pūrvāvasthā / ghaṭamānayogitvāt karmayogas tv anantarāvasthā jñānaparipākāt12 / tac ca ---
yad uktaṃ viśiṣṭatvaṃ tad upapannam ity upasaṃharati ---
mithyājñānahetuko hi karmayogaḥ / tac ca mithyājñānaṃ vidyayā
hetvābhāsaḥ paravyāmohārtham upanyasto 'siddhaś coddālakayājñavalkyādīnāṃ12 brahmavidāṃ putrajanakādyupadeśapravṛttiśravaṇāt13 / upadeśo 'pi karmaiva / tvaṃ ca kevalaṃ niṣkriyātmavit
viduṣaś ciram / bhuṅkte tu karmaṇi12 pratibandhābhāvāt / atha sampatsye mucyata ity arthaḥ / śarīrastho 'pi kaunteya
gītā samyag ghaṭate / na kartṛtvaṃ na karmāṇi lokasya sṛjati prabhuḥ --- iti /
/ tasmād yathā vyākhyāta evārtha iti sthitam //
sampadyate yathā lavaṇakṣetre12 patitaṃ vastu lavaṇam eva sampadyate / tasmin brahmaṇi te sthitā yasmāt tasmāt tair
kāṃ gatiṃ kṛṣṇa gacchati / nīlotpaladalacchaviḥ12 kṛṣṇo yugānurūpavarṇo vā // 37-38 //13
janmani yogī mucyate / anekajanmajanitayo(gena_saṃsiddho_bhavati) / tato yāti parāṃ gatim //
/ katham acetanā matto jātāś cetanāḥ punar madasambhūtāḥ / yata evam ato 'haṃ kṛtsnasya jagataḥ prabhavaḥ pralayas tathā / prabhavanty asmād
/ iha prakaraṇe jagatsthitihetūnāṃ12 saṅkīrtanam / vibhūtiprakaraṇe tu kāraṇam akāraṇaṃ vā yad utkṛṣṭaṃ13 sattvaṃ tadupadiśyate / cintanīyaṃ yad utkṛṣṭaṃ sattvaṃ tad
